name: Abyss-sting Triaina
name_jp: アビスティング－トリアイナ
desc: Special Summon 1 "Atlantean" or "Mermail" monster from your hand or GY, and if you do, equip it with this card. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can send this card to the GY instead. You can banish this card from your GY, then target up to 3 of your Fish, Sea Serpent, and/or Aqua monsters that are banished or in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Abyss-sting Triaina" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Abyss-sting Triaina" per turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 "Atlantean" or "Mermail" monster from your hand or GY, and if you do, equip it with this card. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can send this card to the GY instead. You can banish this card from your GY, then target up to 3 of your Fish, Sea Serpent, and/or Aqua monsters that are banished or in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Abyss-sting Triaina" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Abyss-sting Triaina" per turn.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
